request.prompt: Create the directory D:/Projects/TitantShift/Testing/matrix-20260420-035837/P1_frontend_quality/landing and write one self-contained HTML file to D:/Projects/TitantShift/Testing/matrix-20260420-035837/P1_frontend_quality/landing/index.html.
